SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-11-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Marc Seidenfeld, clerk-beth wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal.
9:30am
Appellant, Tiffany Caine, appears in Pro Per. There is no appearance by respondent, Marsha Keaton. Ms. Caine, previously sworn, testifies in the narrative.
9:33am
Matter is submitted. No new evidence is admitted,
